body.title: Use HTML as default output format for planning artifacts and specs
body.result: HTML levers doc + generic spec template; /decided and /day-close skill guidance updated for HTML artifacts (ADC 29cc1df)
body.description:
Markdown past ~100 lines becomes unnavigable and prevents genuine human engagement. HTML enables tabs, SVG diagrams, side-by-side comparisons, mobile-responsive layout, and richer information density without AI resorting to ASCII workarounds. Prompt is trivial: 'make an HTML file.' Apply to: levers doc conversion, spec templates in /decided, day-close Discussion posts, exploration docs comparing design alternatives.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/decided/SKILL.md (spec output guidance), ~/.claude/skills/day-close/SKILL.md (Discussion post format), lab/docs/Deterministic_AI_Development_Levers_A_layer_on_top_of_skills.md (convert to HTML)
**Design rules:** none — pure output format choice
**Scope boundary:** In scope: update skill guidance to default HTML for planning artifacts, convert levers doc to HTML. Out of scope: retroactive conversion of all existing docs, runtime rendering infrastructure.
**Test plan:** Verify levers doc renders correctly in browser; verify /decided produces HTML spec for a test decision; verify day-close Discussion post is valid HTML.
